---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Experimental design, measurement reliability, and applied statistics."
pagetitle: "Research & publications — Ruwan C. Karunanayaka"
description: "Publications and research by Ruwan C. Karunanayaka: experimental design, generalizability theory, measurement reliability, sports analytics, and the reliability of AI evaluation."
---

<!--
  Fill the exact titles/authors/volume/pages marked [VERIFY] from your CV
  before publishing. Better to flag a gap than guess a citation.
-->

::: {.eyebrow}
Peer-reviewed
:::

## Publications

- **[VERIFY exact title]** — bias reduction via complementation of orthogonal arrays.
  *Statistics & Probability Letters* **237** (2026), art. 110819.
  doi: [10.1016/j.spl.2026.110819](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.spl.2026.110819)

- **[VERIFY exact title]** — shot-selection strategies in elite handball.
  *International Journal of Sports Science & Coaching* (2025).
  doi: [10.1177/17479541251369049](https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541251369049)

- **[VERIFY exact title]** — design of experiments under the baseline parameterization.
  *Australian & New Zealand Journal of Statistics* (2018).  [add volume/pages/DOI]

- **[VERIFY exact title]** — fractional-factorial designs.
  *Journal of Statistical Planning and Inference* (2017).  [add volume/pages/DOI]

::: {.figure-caption}
The 2017 and 2018 design papers have since been cited in applied work across textile engineering, food science, hydrology, and mining.
:::

::: {.eyebrow}
Under review
:::

## Manuscripts under review

- **Distributional Generalizability Theory: Reliability for Non-Gaussian Measurements.**
  Under review, *Psychometrika* (the journal of the Psychometric Society).

- **Decomposing the uncertainty of AI fairness audits: a multivariate generalizability framework.**
  Under review, *RSS: Data Science and Artificial Intelligence* (Royal Statistical Society).

- **Response-scale reliability for count measurements: distributional generalizability theory for hurdle models, with an application to Twenty20 cricket.**
  Under review, *Australian & New Zealand Journal of Statistics* (ANZJS).

- **How Many Matches Before a Shooting Indicator Is Trustworthy? Generalizability of Team Shooting Performance in Elite Handball.**
  Under review, *International Journal of Sports Science & Coaching* (IJSSC).

- **Quantifying the Carleton Bias: A Multi-Facet Bayesian Account of Plate-Appearance Reliability.**
  Under review, *International Journal of Data Science and Analytics* (IJDSA).

- **Election-Level Populism Scoring with Large Language Models: Coverage, Calibration, and Reliability.**
  In preparation.

::: {.eyebrow}
Ongoing work
:::

## Active program

Beyond the manuscripts above, I maintain an active research program in measurement reliability, experimental design, and sports analytics — including the reliability of AI and machine-learning evaluation — with further work at various stages. The interactive tools the program produces are on the [projects page](projects.qmd).

::: {.eyebrow}
Service
:::

## Peer review

Reviewer, *Journal of Sports Analytics* (2024).

::: {.eyebrow}
Software
:::

## Code & tools

- **`dgt`** — R package for generalizability-theory decision studies. [github.com/rckaruna/dgt](https://github.com/rckaruna/dgt)
- **Forecasting applications** — deployed interactive tools for cricket, tennis, and soccer. [See projects](projects.qmd)
